archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Modified for Athletics/School Pride)
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine stark, brutalist structural elements with proud, energetic athletic school colors.
Emotion First: Convey discipline, precision, and excellence. The layout should feel as precise as a marching band formation.
Zoom in: Use oversized typography for key section headings to create impact.
Negative Space: Generous padding around the strict grid modules to allow content to breathe.
Contrast: Employ harsh contrasts—sharp dark borders on white backgrounds with vibrant green and gold accents.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase leading-none

surfaces.cards: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A]

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 glass surface. Top bar announcement: bg-[#2d6a27] text-white py-2 text-xs font-bold text-center tracking-[0.2em] uppercase border-b-2 border-[#0A0A0A]. Logo on the left, primary navigation in center, hamburger for mobile.

buttons.primary: inline-block bg-[#2d6a27] text-white px-8 py-4 font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#1d4a19] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all
buttons.secondary: inline-block bg-[#c8a227] text-[#0A0A0A] px-8 py-4 font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all

components.schedule_table: HTML/Tailwind structure. border-collapse w-full. header bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white uppercase font-bold text-left. rows have border-b-2 border-[#0A0A0A]. hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] transition-colors. Padding `p-4` on cells.
components.forms: Input/textarea fields must have border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] bg-white p-4 rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#2d6a27] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A]. Submit button uses primary style.
components.placeholders: Image blocks MUST use solid backgrounds (e.g., bg-[#2d6a27], bg-[#c8a227], bg-[#0A0A0A]) with border-2 border-[#0A0A0A]. Add an overlay text like 'Media Placeholder' using a monospace font and opacity.

sections_to_build.name: Announcement Banner
sections_to_build.instructions: Full width top banner. Content: 'Leadership Camp – June 24'. Green background, white text.

sections_to_build.name: Header
sections_to_build.instructions: Sticky navigation. Links: About, Schedule, Sections, Media, Contact.

sections_to_build.name: Hero
sections_to_build.instructions: Asymmetrical split. Left: H1 'Ike Instrumental Marching Band', Subtitle 'Rialto, California • Est. 1960'. CTA buttons. Right: Large solid-colored bento grid block serving as a photo placeholder.

sections_to_build.name: About
sections_to_build.instructions: Editorial layout. Bold 'Mission' typography on left, descriptive paragraphs on right emphasizing discipline, teamwork, excellence, and community pride.

sections_to_build.name: Schedule
sections_to_build.instructions: Data-heavy table list. Date, Event, Location, Time. Include placeholder rehearsals, football games, and competitions.

sections_to_build.name: Sections
sections_to_build.instructions: 4-Card Bento Grid (Drumline, Brass, Woodwinds, Color Guard). Each card features a distinct solid color accent, bold title, and short descriptive text.

sections_to_build.name: Media
sections_to_build.instructions: Asymmetrical masonry-like grid of solid-color placeholders with borders. Indicate aspect ratios (e.g., 16:9 for videos, 4:3 for gallery).

sections_to_build.name: Contact & Footer
sections_to_build.instructions: Two columns. Left: Director placeholder info, large @ikeinstrumental Instagram link. Right: Formspree-enabled HTML contact form.

accessibility_and_testing: Ensure contrast ratios meet WCAG AA.
All interactive elements (buttons, links, form fields) MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="nav-link-schedule"', 'data-testid="contact-submit-button"').
Use semantic HTML (header, nav, main, section, footer, article).
